mapper.select: SELECT m.memberNo, b.bookNumber, b.bookTitle, b.bookImg, l.requeststate, l.dueDate, l.extension FROM loan l JOIN member m ON l.memberNo = m.memberNo JOIN book b ON l.bookNumber = b.bookNumber WHERE requeststate IN (1, 2)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan (bookNumber, memberNo, requeststate) VALUES (#{bookNumber}, #{memberNo}, #{requestState})
mapper.select: SELECT b.Category FROM loan l JOIN book b ON l.bookNumber = b.bookNumber WHERE l.memberNo = #{memberNo} GROUP BY b.Category ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
